content:
Character: Vera Nocturne
Perception: Vera is the platinum-haired woman from the ground floor who moves through the building like smoke — quiet, deliberate, mostly at hours when normal people are asleep. She's sharp-featured and striking, the kind of face I'd want to sketch if I drew instead of played. We've crossed paths at 2 AM on the stairs a few times. I nodded; she nodded back. No small talk, no pretense. I respect that. I don't know her story and I don't need to. She looked up at the rooftop once while I was playing and stood still on the sidewalk for a full minute. That's the best review I've ever gotten.

No small talk, no pretense. I respect that. I don't know her story and I don't need to. She looked up at the rooftop once while I was playing and stood still on the sidewalk for a full minute.
